title: Italian Food
description: Italian Food Minecraft Mod brings a taste of Italy to your Minecraft world by introducing a variety of authentic Italian dishes. Craft and enjoy foods like focaccia, pizza, mozzarella, taralli, espresso, and tiramisù, each offering unique in-game effects
body:
# Italian Food Minecraft Mod
Italian Food is a Minecraft Mod that brings the authentic flavors of Italy to your Minecraft world! Immerse yourself in a culinary adventure where traditional Italian dishes not only satisfy your hunger but also grant unique, beneficial effects to enhance your gameplay.

Here's a list of some foods included in the mod, along with their effects:

- Focaccia: A traditional Italian flatbread that grants a temporary boost in health regeneration.

- Pizza: A savory dish that provides increased movement speed for a short duration.

- Mozzarella: Fresh cheese that offers enhanced resistance to damage.

- Taralli: Crunchy snacks that improve mining speed temporarily.

- Espresso: A strong coffee that gives a quick burst of energy, increasing attack speed.

- Tiramisù: A sweet dessert that provides a brief period of night vision.
And More!
  
Each of these dishes can be crafted using a combination of vanilla and custom ingredients, offering special benefits and adding a flavorful twist to your Minecraft adventures.
